sections.paragraph:
in pause שֶׁ֑בִי, with suff. שִׁבְיֹו, שֶׁבְיְךָ, שְׁבִיכֶם (from the root שָׁבָה) m. captivity, Deu 21:13 הָלַךְ בַּשְּׁבִי, ה׳ שְׁבִי to go, to be led into captivity, Jer 22:22 30:16 Lam 1:5 used of beasts, Amo 4:10. Concr.-

(1) captives, שָׁבָה שְׁבִי to lead away captives, Num 21:1 Psa 68:19.

(2) sing. a captive (compare פְּתִי) Exo 12:29. Fem. שְׁבִיָּה Isa 52:2.
